summary: Tested all 6 requested features for iteration 3. All features are working correctly. Backend tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.

issues: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'SRI | Mahakali Tribunal' - this appears to be due to Emergent platform wrapper/iframe, not a code issue. The index.html correctly has <title>SRI | Mahakali Tribunal</title>

passed_tests: ✅ Industry dropdown on thesis editor has all 10 required categories: Energy, Basic Materials, Industrials, Consumer Cyclicals, Consumer Non-Cyclicals, Healthcare, Financials, Technology, Telecommunications Services, Utilities
✅ Thesis editor redirects to /business/company/new if user has no companies, with toast message 'You need to create a company first before creating a thesis'
✅ Thesis detail page shows 'Link Bank Account' button instead of 'Invest Now' when user has no bank account linked
✅ Pricing page Investor tab shows 'Liquidity Windows Fee' heading (not 'Trading Fees')
✅ index.html has correct page title: 'SRI | Mahakali Tribunal'
✅ Thesis detail page has 'Copy Link' button at the bottom after Discussion section
✅ Signup form has role dropdown with 'Investor' and 'Founder / Businessman' options
✅ Theses list and detail endpoints work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested features have been implemented and verified. The page title in index.html is correct ('SRI | Mahakali Tribunal') but may show differently in Emergent platform wrapper. Email sending and Razorpay payments remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis.email_sending: MOCKED - Resend API key not configured, emails logged to console
mocked_apis.razorpay_payments: MOCKED - Razorpay keys not configured, returns enabled=false

features_verified.bank_account_requirement: Shows 'Link Bank Account' button on thesis detail if user has no bank accounts
